parameters.query:
UPDATE appointments
SET status = 'no_show', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE status = 'scheduled'
  AND deleted_at IS NULL
  AND scheduled_at + (duration_minutes || ' minutes')::INTERVAL + INTERVAL '15 minutes' < NOW()
RETURNING
  id,
  scheduled_at,
  appointment_type,
  (SELECT first_name || ' ' || last_name FROM patients WHERE id = patient_id) AS patient_name

parameters.subject: =⚠️ No-show registrado: {{ $json.patient_name }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id,
  a.scheduled_at,
  a.appointment_type,
  a.duration_minutes,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.phone,
  ps.full_name AS psychologist_name
FROM appointments a
JOIN patients p ON p.id = a.patient_id
JOIN psychologists ps ON ps.id = a.psychologist_id
WHERE a.scheduled_at BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '23 hours' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '25 hours'
  AND a.status IN ('scheduled', 'confirmed')
  AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND p.phone IS NOT NULL
  AND p.phone != ''
